summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dashboard Operativa feature for Antonella admin view. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend features verified working correctly including summary cards, filter bar, partner rows with risk/execution badges, expanded row details, and 'Apri scheda partner' CTA navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardOperativa.jsx correctly implements all required features: hero, summary cards, filter bar, partner list with expandable rows
Backend GET /api/partner-journey/dashboard-operativa returns correct structure with summary stats and partner list
Summary cards show: Totale Partner (22), In linea (22), Rallentati (0), Bloccati (0)
Filter bar has all 4 filters: Tutti, Bloccati, Rallentati, In linea with correct data-testid attributes
Partner rows display: name, niche, phase badge, days_in_step, execution_level, risk status
Expanded row shows 'Blocco attuale', 'Azione consigliata', and 'Apri scheda partner' CTA
Partners with percorso_veloce active show '21gg' badge (Arianna Aceto, Marco Orlandi)
Partners are correctly sorted by risk (bloccati first, then rallentati, then in_linea)
Risk computation: >14 days = bloccato for F1-F3, >30 days for others; >7 days = rallentato for F1-F3, >14 for others
Execution level computed from modules completion ratio vs expected for phase
Suggested action varies by risk + phase combination
Sidebar shows 'Dashboard Operativa' under OPERATIVO section in Antonella view
'Apri scheda partner' CTA navigates to partner detail view (/dashboard-partner)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing 22 partners
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Operativa fully tested. Navigation: Login as admin → Click 'Antonella' tab at top → Click 'Dashboard Operativa' in sidebar under OPERATIVO section. Features: 1) Hero with title 'Dashboard Operativa', 2) Summary cards (Totale Partner, In linea, Rallentati, Bloccati), 3) Filter bar (Tutti, Bloccati, Rallentati, In linea), 4) Partner list with expandable rows showing phase, days_in_step, execution_level, risk status, 5) Expanded row shows 'Blocco attuale', 'Azione consigliata', 'Apri scheda partner' CTA. Backend endpoint: GET /api/partner-journey/dashboard-operativa. All 22 partners currently 'in_linea' with 0 days in step (fresh data). Partners with percorso_veloce active show '21gg' badge.
